# CANDIDATE: ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE

**Filed:** 2026-06-22
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** new trade class — ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE filter
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

The ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE filter aims to capture the edge in trading the Opening Range Breakout (ORB) with a narrow OR range, specifically when the OR range is less than $2.00. This filter is designed to work in conjunction with the existing ORB setup, enhancing its performance by focusing on the most promising breakouts.

## Mechanism

The ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE filter will be applied to the existing ORB setup, checking if the OR range is less than $2.00 before allowing the trade to trigger. If the OR range is $2.00 or wider, the trade will be skipped. This filter is intended to improve the overall performance of the ORB setup by eliminating trades with wider OR ranges, which may be less reliable.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** The account-size assumption for this candidate is $25K+, which is the minimum required for the ORB setup.
